seoTitle: How to Connect a Vapi AI Voice Agent to GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to link a Vapi AI voice agent to GoHighLevel to automate phone calls, qualify leads, and sync call data with your CRM in 2026.
intro: Pairing a Vapi AI voice agent with GoHighLevel lets you automate phone conversations for lead qualification, appointment booking, and follow-ups without adding headcount. This guide covers connecting the two platforms and getting call automation running.

steps.heading: Connect your Vapi account to GoHighLevel
steps.body: Start the integration by linking your Vapi account to GoHighLevel through the platform's integration settings.

steps.heading: Configure API credentials
steps.body: Enter the required API credentials from Vapi so the two systems can communicate and pass call data back and forth.

steps.heading: Link your AI voice agent
steps.body: Connect the specific voice agent you've built in Vapi so it becomes available for use within GoHighLevel's call workflows.

steps.heading: Set up inbound and outbound call workflows
steps.body: Configure workflows for how the AI agent handles incoming calls and when it should place outbound calls, such as for follow-ups or lead qualification.

steps.heading: Sync call data with your CRM
steps.body: Make sure call outcomes and transcripts flow back into GoHighLevel's CRM so your team has visibility into what happened on each AI-handled call.

faq.question: What can a Vapi AI voice agent do inside GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: It can handle tasks like lead qualification, appointment booking, customer support, follow-ups, and call routing automatically.

faq.question: Do I need coding experience to connect Vapi to GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: You'll need to configure API credentials, but the process is largely a matter of entering settings rather than writing custom code.

faq.question: Does the AI agent reduce manual work for my team?
faq.answer: Yes, that's the main appeal, since it can handle routine calls and qualification tasks automatically, freeing your team to focus on higher-value conversations.

faq.question: Can I use this for both inbound and outbound calls?
faq.answer: Yes, the integration supports setting up workflows for both inbound calls the agent answers and outbound calls it initiates.
